MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-20-2011 IN 206, DEFENDANT SAMUEL JOHNSON'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/24/11 IS CONTINUED TO 1/31/11 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:00 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 1/20/11 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 514 IS VACATED. DISCOVERY SHALL BE RE-OPENED IN THIS CASE SUCH THAT THE TIME FOR COMPLETING DISCOVERY IS AS TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE, BUT ONLY AS TO DISCOVERY THAT COULD NOT REASONABLY HAVE BEEN ACCOMPLISHED PRIOR TO 1/20/11. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-31-2011 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON FEB-14-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. APPEARANCES FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. NOTICE WAIVED BY ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-14-2011 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON FEB-22-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR SETTLEMENT PROTECTIVE DATE. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
